T0191.title: ID Issuance Region Lookup
T0191.definition: In illicit data trading, refers to the ability to query the place of household registration linked to a national ID number based on its first six digits.
T0191.description: In illicit data trading, refers to the ability to query the place of household registration linked to a national ID number based on its first six digits.
T0191.usageExample: "Can filter by region, ID registration origin, phone number origin, real-name verification, contact to order"
